title: DeathKick
description: A simple plugin that kicks players on death! Also has a feature called DeathBan.
body: DeathKick is a simple plugin that kicks players on death. You may toggle this feature as well as DeathBan on and off. DeathBan bans players on death. It is extremely customizable because it simply runs /kick or /ban so you can have a custom layout message! DeathBan is enbled by default. Can be changed in config.yml.
